creator: anders@fix.no
text:
Hi,

Uhm. I think this port should have PORTNAME py-gdchart too. There is
already a gdchart port. Also, maybe it should be considered to use the
gdchart port as a dependancy instead of using a local copy of both
gdchart and gd. I modified my gdchart port to use PNGs instead of GIFs
like recent versions of gd does. There are legal issues attached, and
the gd author recommends switching to PNG. I don't see a good reason for
using outdated versions of gd from sub-libraries.

Let me know if you need the gdchart port updated to version 0.10.1 to
use it.

Cheers,

-- 
Anders.
